zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Talbot於1286年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾林頓時，她的父親Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal37歲，母親Sarah de Beauchamp37歲。她於1303年之前與Roger de Chandos 1st Baron Chandos結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1357年在英國英格蘭賀福爾福普享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Talbot于1286年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾林頓时，她的父亲Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal37岁，母亲Sarah de Beauchamp37岁。她于1303年之前与Roger de Chandos 1st Baron Chandos结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1357年在英国英格兰賀福爾福普享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Talbot was born in 1286, in Linton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal, was 37 and her mother, Sarah de Beauchamp, was 37. She married Roger de Chandos 1st Baron Chandos before 1303. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1357, in Fownhope, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Talbot est née en 1286, à Linton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Sarah de Beauchamp, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Chandos 1st Baron Chandos avant 1303. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1357, à Fownhope, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Talbot 1286 in Linton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal 37 und ihre Mutter Sarah de Beauchamp 37. Sie hat vor 1303 Roger de Chandos 1st Baron Chandos geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1357 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Fownhope, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Talbotが1286年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリントンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswalは37歳，母Sarah de Beauchampは37歳であった。1303年以前にRoger de Chandos 1st Baron Chandosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1357年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアフォウンhオペで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Talbot(이)가 1286년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 린턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah de Beauchamp(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1303년 이전 Roger de Chandos 1st Baron Chandos(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1357년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 파운홉에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Talbot родилась в 1286 г. в местности линтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah de Beauchamp, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Chandos 1st Baron Chandos перед 1303 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1357 г. в местности фоуноп, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.
